The Weekly Pulse of Search.

Tracking 2,419 keyword-week pairs across four channels and three brands. Numbers reflect deduplicated search volume at the keyword level. Filter to interrogate.

ⓘ  The dates shown in this dashboard (e.g. 12 Jan, 19 Jan) are the reporting dates — the search volume shown is for the 7-day period prior to that date.
